mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan, amount, duration_days, expire_time, status, out_trade_no, trade_no, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_record (user_id, plan, amount, duration_days, expire_time, status, out_trade_no) VALUES (#{userId}, #{plan}, #{amount}, #{durationDays}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{outTradeNo})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_record SET status = #{status}, trade_no = #{tradeNo}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}
